str.reason: This build pushes {{ability}} so you hit melee breakpoints early.
str.forecast: Higher {{ability}} feeds melee attacks, melee damage, and other front-line options later.

dex.reason: This build keeps {{ability}} high for accuracy, defense, and initiative.
dex.forecast: Higher {{ability}} supports ranged pressure, Reflex, and general defensive play later.

con.reason: This build protects {{ability}} so you do not feel fragile at level 1.
con.forecast: Higher {{ability}} raises hit points, Fortitude, and overall staying power later.

int.reason: This build invests in {{ability}} for broader training and problem-solving lanes.
int.forecast: Higher {{ability}} supports skill training, technical lanes, and language breadth later.

wis.reason: This build values {{ability}} for awareness, judgment, and force capacity.
wis.forecast: Higher {{ability}} supports Will, Force Training capacity, and perception-driven paths later.

cha.reason: This build keeps {{ability}} relevant for presence, leadership, and force expression.
cha.forecast: Higher {{ability}} supports social scenes, leadership options, and many Force power checks later.

amplify.title: Lean Into Species
amplify.subtitle: Doubles down on what your species already does well.
amplify.summary: This build amplifies your species strengths instead of spending early points fighting them.
amplify.caution: It can leave off-plan abilities thin, so you may feel more specialized early on.

balanced.title: Balanced Starter
balanced.subtitle: A safer all-purpose spread for new players.
balanced.summary: This build chases efficient modifier breakpoints while avoiding the most painful early dumps.
balanced.caution: It is steadier than sharper, so it may not spike one lane as hard as the focused plan.

mitigate.title: Patch Weaknesses
mitigate.subtitle: Smooths penalties and keeps rough edges playable.
mitigate.summary: This build spends more of your budget covering weak spots so the species penalties hurt less.
mitigate.caution: It sacrifices some top-end specialization in exchange for a safer floor.

reasons.species_bonus_amplified: {{ability}} already has a species bonus, so this build pushes it to a cleaner breakpoint.
reasons.species_penalty_mitigated: {{ability}} has a species penalty, so this build spends points to keep it from lagging too far behind.
reasons.survivability_floor: It preserves a minimum floor in {{ability}} so the character still feels playable at level 1.
reasons.breakpoint_focus: It prefers even-number breakpoints where point buy actually turns into a new modifier.
reasons.odd_score_setup: It accepts an odd score in {{ability}} only because that point is setting up a later breakpoint instead of being wasted.
reasons.top_roll_assignment: It places one of your best numbers into {{ability}} because that is where the build gets the most immediate return.
reasons.species_signal_absent: Because this step comes so early, this build focuses on honest fundamentals instead of pretending the system already knows your class.
reasons.live_budget: This spread was generated from your live {{budget}}-point budget, not from a hardcoded array.
reasons.live_pool: This spread was generated from the numbers you rolled, not from a prewritten preset.
